creator: qk371994@gmail.com
text: I have a thinkpad X220 and freeBSD works! but when i try to connect to wifi it takes forever to find my network and when it does it doesn't connect and i have to rescan the networks for 30 minutes untill it will connect every single time i turn off or susspend my laptop. its really annoying. someone told me it might have something to do with wpa_cli. i have no idea what it exactly does but i just hope this can be fixed.
